query:
SELECT 
  id,
  clientId,
  sessionDate,
  startTime,
  lastReminderSentAt,
  DATE(lastReminderSentAt) as reminder_date,
  TIME(lastReminderSentAt) as reminder_time,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, lastReminderSentAt, NOW()) as hours_since_reminder,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, lastReminderSentAt, NOW()) as minutes_since_reminder
FROM training_sessions
WHERE lastReminderSentAt IS NOT NULL
  AND lastReminderSentAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
ORDER BY lastReminderSentAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
